def: One who believes that Christ will reign personally on earth athousand years; a Chiliast; also, a believer in the universalprevalence of Christianity for a long period.
The glycerin salt of ricinoleic acid, occuring as acharacteristic constituent of castor oil; -- formerly called palmin.

To lie concealed; to keep one's self out of view; to bewithdrawn from sight or observation.Bred to disguise, in public 'tis you hide. Pope.Hide and seek, a play of children, in which some hide themselves, andothers seek them. Swift.
The bathing of the feet, a bath for the feet. [Obs.]
In a precipitate manner; headlong; hastily; rashly. Swift.
Consisting of, containing, or resembling, mother (in vinegar).
Sexual desire or oestrus of deer, cattle, and various othermammals; heat; also, the period during which the oestrus exists.
